_comment: Illustrative LLM output for Knowledge Gap Finder.

gaps.impact_if_unaddressed: Mobile launch blocked entirely — no team member has shipped a React Native app. Q3 milestone at risk.

learning_path.recommended_resource: React Native docs + Expo crash course (egghead.io) + ship a prototype app to TestFlight
learning_path.who_should_lead: Alex Chen — strongest React fundamentals, fastest path to React Native proficiency

gaps.impact_if_unaddressed: AI feature delayed or implemented without cost control — risk of budget overrun.

learning_path.recommended_resource: OpenAI cookbook + n8n LLM nodes + internal session reviewing #87 AI Cost Monitor workflow
learning_path.who_should_lead: Maria Santos — backend, already works with APIs; integrate cost monitoring from day one

gaps.impact_if_unaddressed: Enterprise SSO project requires external contractor or 2-week ramp-up delay.

learning_path.recommended_resource: Auth0 SSO documentation + SAML2 integration guide + Passport.js SAML module
learning_path.who_should_lead: Maria Santos — auth domain expert from existing Auth work

strengths_to_leverage: Maria Santos: Auth expertise — own the SSO spike and lead backend for AI integration
Alex Chen: React depth — fastest path to React Native; lead mobile frontend
James Kim: Design systems — owns mobile UX patterns and handoff; already has Figma mobile components
David Osei: GraphQL API design — lead real-time collaboration API contract design
analysis.hiring_recommendation: Consider a React Native contractor for 6 weeks to accelerate the Q3 mobile launch while Alex ramps on the platform. Internal learning alone may not close the gap in time for a July 31 target.
analysis.quarter_readiness_assessment: The team is strong on backend, design, and web frontend — but has a critical gap in mobile (React Native) and meaningful gaps in LLM integration and enterprise auth. These gaps map directly to the three highest-priority Q3 projects. Address React Native first; it has no internal coverage. LLM and SAML can be closed with 3–5 days of focused learning each.
